---
title: py basics
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
source("~/github/how2/_knitr_config.R")
```

*********************************************************************

## docstrings

```python
def square(value):
    """Return the square of a value"""
    new_value = value ** 2
    return new_value
```

*********************************************************************

## tuples

unpacking

```python
even_nums = (2, 4, 6)
a, b, c = even_nums 
```

*********************************************************************

## scope

* global - defines the main body of a script  
* local - defined inside a function  
* built-in - names in the pre-defined built-ins module  

### nonlocal

* used when defining a function that is nested inside another function
* allows the nested function to use/modify variables defined in the outer function

```{python}
def myfunc1():
    x = "John"
    def myfunc2():
        nonlocal x
        x = "hello"
    myfunc2() 
    return x

print(myfunc1())
```

*********************************************************************

## pandas

read_sql(query, con)
